resources.string: Keep your business notifications synced in one place.

Allow notification access so this app can securely forward purchase and service messages to your dashboard. Snapchat and Viber are prioritized — previews depend on each app’s notification settings (enable message previews where available).

Great! Incoming notifications sync automatically. A foreground connection plus a system alarm (every ~4 minutes) try to keep the dashboard online after you leave the app or if the OEM stops the process — still allow unrestricted battery below, and on Xiaomi / Oppo / Samsung use Autostart or Lock app in recents when needed.
Without notification access, WhatsApp/Telegram and other chat alerts will not sync to the dashboard (SMS/call sync still works separately). Tap below, enable Wallet Hub, then return here.
Dashboard: device registered. Open the Devices tab on the web app.
Dashboard: add Supabase keys in android-app/supabase.properties, then rebuild and reinstall the APK.
Grant SMS and call log access to upload your full native SMS threads and complete call history to the dashboard (not WhatsApp/Telegram — those stay in-app).
SMS or call log permission was denied.
Keeps your device visible as online on the web dashboard
Background sync active. You can hide this in system notification settings.
For reliable background sync, allow unrestricted battery for Wallet Hub (some phones also need Autostart in system settings).
Block apps from syncing (package names, comma-separated, e.g. com.bank.app). When enabled, long digit sequences in message text are redacted before upload.
Redact OTP-like digits in message text
Last captures from the notification listener (blocked, upload ok, or errors). Does not store full message bodies.
No captures yet — trigger a notification from an allowed app.
SMS/call backup sync runs about every 15 minutes when online.
